title: The Stolen Mona Lisa

segments.text: In 1911, the Mona Lisa was stolen from the Louvre.
An Italian handyman hid the painting for over two years.
He believed it belonged in Italy, not France.
The theft shocked the art world and gained international attention.
Ultimately, the painting was recovered and returned to the Louvre.
A case that transformed art theft into a global spectacle.
Follow for cases the world never forgot.

description: In 1911, the Mona Lisa was stolen for two years, creating a worldwide sensation. Follow for daily cold cases! 🎨
